title: Paper Mario: The Thousand Year Door - Blimp Ride
description: Music from Paper Mario: The Thousand-Year Door for the GameCube. This track plays when traveling on the Blimp. Amazing it's so long, yet it plays for barely 30 seconds, except for the first time. :/
